extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows for the Company, Directors, Promoters and Subsidiaries, while excluding all “By” rows. Criminal proceedings against total 4 (1 Company, 1 Director, 1 Promoter and 1 Subsidiary); statutory/regulatory proceedings against total 5 (3 Company and 2 Subsidiaries); tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries total 8 (1 Company and 7 Subsidiaries), excluding the 2 tax proceedings against Directors and 2 against Promoters as personal matters. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is the stated ₹0.67 million plus ₹16.34 million, or ₹17.01 million = ₹1.701 crore; promoter/director amounts and all “By” amounts are excluded. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹2.96 million as at September 30, 2023, converted to ₹0.296 crore; no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage and no auditor or going-concern status are disclosed in the provided text. The source tables use ₹ in millions, converted to crore at 1 crore = ₹10 million.
